case_title: AMANDA WATSON VS. HOT TUNA INTERNATIONAL, INC., A DELAWARE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATSON, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT HOT TUNA INTERNATIONAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WATSON, AMANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOT TUNA INTERNATIONAL, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION $4,892.40 PRINCIPAL, $37.70 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,130.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
